title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 261.230 - AgriMissouri marketing program and agricultural products by category, rules authorized, director's duty
text:
261.230.  AgriMissouri marketing program and agricultural products by category, rules authorized, director's duty. — The director of the department of agriculture shall, for the use of the agriculture business development division of the department of agriculture, develop and implement rules and regulations by product category for all Missouri agricultural products included in the AgriMissouri marketing program.
(L. 2000 S.B. 894 § 261.032, A.L. 2002 H.B. 1348, A.L. 2008 S.B. 931)
